body_preview: - Assessment self-test: `yyds state why` (full scan) FAIL — "times out after 10s (121K events)" - `yyds state why last-failure` PASSES because it uses `DEFAULT_WHY_LIMIT = 10_000` - Root cause at src/commands_state.rs:109-110: when no `--limit` is given and id != "last-failure", `limit = 0` which `read_tail_events` treats as "scan all 121K events" → timeout
expected_evidence: `yyds state why <event-id>` no longer appears as FAIL in assessment self-tests State doctor continues to report healthy event stream Implementation Notes: Change line 110 in src/commands_state.rs from `0 // full scan for specific event IDs` to `BOUNDED_FULL_SCAN_CAP`. When the event isn't found within the bounded window, the existing "not found" message shou
title: Bound default `state why` event scan to prevent timeout at 121K+ events
